title: Note Plaques
description: A Create Addon that adds token items that aid in connecting steam whistles to Redstone Links.
body: I made this mod because I wanted to have an easier way to connect redstone links to my pipe organ, because I really wanted to have one frequency used for the type of pipe and the other for the note. Thus I quickly whipped up this spaghetti code mod to help with that. Currently there are no crafting recipes and other versions, but these will soon be added.
